General.Name: Miko International Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Miko International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, wholesales, retails, and sells children's apparel and other apparel related products in the People's Republic of China. It operates through the Wholesale and Supply Chain Management segments. The company trades bulk commodity products. It sells its products through distributors; and retail stores under the redkids brand. Miko International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Quanzhou, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: No. 168, Chong Rong Street, Quanzhou, China, 362000
